input.headline: Washington’s governor declares emergency so Seattle airport will get fuel despite pipeline leak

raw.headline: Washington’s governor declares emergency so Seattle airport will get fuel despite pipeline leak

winner: Governor Jay Inslee declared an emergency so Seattle Airport would get fuel—then immediately called for a "no-fuel emergency" after realizing the pipeline was actually delivering *alcohol* instead of gas.

candidates.text: I guess even the governor couldn't afford to let the airport run out of fuel, just in case people needed to flee the state. Priorities.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific to the situation, with a touch of dark humor that highlights the absurdity of the priority."}

candidates.text: Seattle Airport is running on fumes—literally! The governor declared a fuel emergency so they could keep their planes aloft, even if their pipelines can’t stay dry.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'running on fumes' and 'pipelines can’t stay dry' add clever wordplay and surprise, while staying specific to the headline."}

candidates.text: Governor declared state of emergency because Seattle airport needed fuel... turns out they just wanted someone else to blame for their terrible parking job.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the connection between the pipeline leak and parking is a stretch and feels forced, reducing its overall humor impact."}

candidates.text: The governor said the pipeline leak was bad for business—so he declared an emergency to make sure the airport got its fuel. Meanwhile, Seattle’s coffee shops are still out of triple espresso.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific to the situation, but the humor falls flat due to a weak punchline about coffee shops that doesn't clearly tie back to the pipeline or emergency declaration."}

candidates.text: Governor Jay Inslee declared an emergency so Seattle Airport would get fuel—then immediately called for a "no-fuel emergency" after realizing the pipeline was actually delivering *alcohol* instead of gas.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the humor falls flat due to an implausible twist (pipeline delivering alcohol) that feels forced rather than clever. The setup could be stronger for maximum impact."}
